stt.detail: Server-backed STT bridge is configured at http://127.0.0.1:8171/inference.

tts.detail: Set STARLOG_BRIDGE_TTS_SERVER_URL for a resident local server, or STARLOG_BRIDGE_TTS_CMD for command-backed synthesis.

clip.detail: Set STARLOG_BRIDGE_CLIP_CMD to route bridge clip actions into existing Starlog capture tooling.

stt.transcript: and so my fellow Americans ask not what your country can do for you ask what you can do for your country.
stt.detail: Bridge transcribed audio through the configured local STT server.
